control_definition: Solid tissue normal samples in TCGA-LIHC
inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset hcc_adult_core because public gdc project arms are explicit and can be curated separately from the paper's aggregated counts.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/hcc_adult_core.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
The comparator arm is derived from a curated public project arm rather than the exact paper-level aggregate.
